description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and defines a single stage called build. Add a MakeCheck job in the build stage that runs a global before_script to update apt and install autopoint, autoconf, automake, libtool-bin, gettext, libncursesw5-dev, dejagnu, libnuma-dev, and libsystemd-dev, then executes ./autogen.sh, ./configure, make, and make check as its script, and runs make clean in an after_script. Configure the job to publish the files test-suite.log, testsuite/*.log, and testsuite/*.sum as artifacts. No caches, services, variables, or conditional rules are required.
